trajectory.description: Observation: Starting fresh with no code. Analysis: Need to build a classifier for CIFAR-100-LT with extreme class imbalance (ratio 100). Key strategies: use pretrained model (ConvNeXt-Tiny or CLIP ViT), class-balanced loss, strong augmentation, and possibly mixup/cutmix. Decision: Write model.py, train.py, predict.py, train for 5 epochs to get baseline and measure time.

Decision: Submit eval for baseline, then train improved version with mixup/cutmix, stronger augmentation, label smoothing, and more epochs.

trajectory.description: Observation: 0.84 balanced accuracy with ConvNeXt-Tiny. Few-shot acc is 0.77, dragging overall score. Analysis: Need stronger backbone and better handling of tail classes. Decision: Switch to CLIP ViT-B/16 (stronger pretrained features), add TTA in predict.py, use focal loss, better LR schedule with warmup, train 40 epochs.

trajectory.description: Observation: ViT-B/16 massively overfits (0.675 val vs 0.84 test with ConvNeXt-Tiny). Analysis: ViT too large for 32x32 upscaled images, ConvNeXt-Tiny is better suited. Decision: Revert to ConvNeXt-Tiny with improved training: two-stage (representation then balanced), stronger regularization, EMA. Train ~20 epochs with 160x160 for speed.
